0.1.23: Fixed: missions that don't place a map marker — mining, ore scanning and friends — used to show nothing at all. They now resolve their blueprint pool and appear in the mission picker like everything else.
New: your rank with each mission giver, worked out from the highest-rank mission you've been offered. Hit “Verify from logs” in the ⚙ to backfill it from your play history.
The guaranteed rewards and the random blueprint pool are now clearly separated — the pool says “1 random blueprint per completion”, because that's what it is.
Guaranteed item rewards now have their own tick box, so you can check off the ones you've picked up (kept separate from your blueprint count).
The owned count moved up next to the mission name — the ⚙ and move handle were sitting on top of it.
A long blueprint pool no longer pushes the panel sideways into a horizontal scrollbar.
The header now reads “Active Mission” instead of a second “Blueprint Pool”.
0.1.22: New: the overlay diamond glows purple when SubliminalsTV is live on Twitch — hover it and click to jump into the stream.
In the Fabricator, the diamond glows gold so you can tell the tracker sees the kiosk.
Both opt-in screen-reading features (pinned-mission scan + item-image capture) now appear in Settings and the overlay ⚙, and stay in sync.
Open the full Settings window straight from the overlay ⚙.
Pasting a sync token now turns syncing on automatically — no more forgetting the checkbox.
New: a settings ⚙ on the overlay — the odds view (base / your real odds) and “Verify from logs” now live in there, and you can hide the category filter bar, for a cleaner HUD.
Cleaner footer: your Collected count is now big and clear, with the tracker version and game build stacked neatly beside it.
The overlay now shows what the item-image scanner is doing — a quick toast when it reads your pinned mission or captures a fabricator item, plus a live status in the ⚙ menu.
New: toggle mission-name scanning on/off from the overlay ⚙ menu (reads the mission you have pinned in-game — off by default).
Fixed: the pinned-mission reader now recognizes missions whose names are cut off on-screen or contain quotes (e.g. Terrorist Shigemori "Jester" Amsden…).
Mission Info (faction / type / reputation) now opens by default.
Settings tidied up for the blueprint tracker.
0.1.21: Mission-Complete card now shows the actual item render for each blueprint you unlock — one big image for a single drop, a grid for more.
New: opt-in log sharing (Settings) — help improve mission & blueprint detection. Your handle, account, IP and chat are stripped before anything is sent. Off by default.
Recent lists can now show relative time ("2h ago") or the exact date & clock — toggle in Settings.
Settings window restyled to match subliminal.gg.
The tracker's source code is now public on GitHub.
